7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_v32

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 792
Recv ID: 793
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 67
Func Name: BCB

[
  {
    "diagversion": "68",
    "supplier": "93H",
    "soft": "0700",
    "version": "0000"
